noSub.canceled: Your subscription is canceled. Reactivate whenever you like and pick up right where you left off.
noSub.inactive: Your subscription is not active yet. Start your training whenever you're ready.
noSub.cardDescription: $25 USD/month · cancel anytime · all modules unlock week by week.

week.status: You're in Week {currentWeek} of 72 of the program.
week.noModule: We couldn't find this week's module. If this persists, let us know at admisiones@dapglobal.org.

notStarted.startsOn: It starts on {startsAt}. That day Week 1 opens and you'll receive an email notice.
notStarted.noDate: You don't have a start date assigned yet. You'll get an email once admissions approves your application and issues your enrollment number.
notStarted.explore: In the meantime you can explore the <community>community</community> or the <tutor>AI tutor</tutor>.

past.title: Review
past.emptyDescription: Your program is just beginning — there are no modules to review yet.
past.description: The content is always available. The assignments have already closed.

upcoming.title: Upcoming
upcoming.emptyDescription: You've reached the end of the program. Congratulations.
upcoming.description: Each module opens on the Tuesday of its week.

resources.title: Resources
resources.tutor: AI Tutor — ask about any DAP doctrine

admission.metaDescription: Complete your admission form for the Apostolic Pastoral Diploma.
admission.title: Your admission form
admission.intro: Complete these details so the admissions team can review your application. We'll email you as soon as it's ready.

pending.title: Application received
pending.description: Your form reached the admissions team. We'll review it shortly and notify you by email.

underReview.title: Under review
underReview.description: The admissions team is reviewing your application. If we need more information, we'll reach out.

rejected.title: Not approved
rejected.description: Your application was not approved in this round. We invite you to write to us to understand the next steps.

approved.title: Approved
approved.description: Your application is approved. Enter the dashboard to begin.

admissionStatus.spamNote: Check your spam folder in case our reply lands there. We'll email you as soon as we have news.

agenda.title: Your schedule at DAP
agenda.description: Here you'll see the weekly calendar with your modules, live MasterClasses and mentorships. In the meantime, scheduled live sessions are under Live and your module for the week is on Home.

certifications.title: Your certificates
certifications.description: Here you'll be able to download all your certificates and share the dimensions you've earned. For now you can see your progress and the dimensions earned from My Progress.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Enable browser notifications to get an alert every Tuesday when your new module opens, and when your weekly feedback from Ap. Max arrives.

password.title: Password
password.description: If you want to change it, we'll send a link to your email.

support.title: More settings soon
support.description: Coming soon: edit profile, manage subscription, language and time zone, privacy options.

community.title: Pastors' forum
community.subtitle: Connect with other pastors and leaders of the DAP. Share revelations, questions and testimonies.

empty.title: No threads yet
empty.description: Be the first to start a conversation.

communityNew.title: New thread
communityNew.subtitle: Share a question, a revelation or invite others to a conversation. Markdown supported.

thread.emptyReplies: No replies yet. Be the first to take part.
thread.threadClosed: This thread is closed. No more replies are accepted.

live.title: DAP sessions
live.subtitle: MasterClasses, activations and group mentorships. Recordings remain available after each session.

emptyUpcoming.title: No scheduled sessions
emptyUpcoming.description: The team hasn't scheduled any upcoming sessions yet. In the meantime, explore the available recordings.

emptyRecordings.title: No recordings yet
emptyRecordings.description: Recordings appear here after each live session.

phases.title: The 9 Blocks
phases.subtitle: Your complete journey. Each block delivers a new dimension.

dimensions.title: Dimensions earned
dimensions.empty: You haven't reached any dimension yet. Complete the 8 modules of a block to earn the first one (Disciple).

certificates.title: Certificates issued
certificates.empty: You don't have any certificates issued yet. They're generated automatically when you complete each block.

completed.title: Latest completed modules
completed.empty: You haven't completed any module yet. Start with your current week's module from <home>Home</home>.

tutor.title: Ask whatever you need
tutor.subtitle: I answer only based on the DAP's apostolic materials. If the answer isn't in the documents, I'll tell you.
tutor.selectPrevious: Or select a previous conversation from the sidebar.
